'''''Dreadnaught-One''''', called '''''D-One''''' for short, was the first of six [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruisers]] used on ''[[Outbound Flight]]''.

==History==
It came directly off of the [[Rendili StarDrive/Legends|Rendili StarDrive]] line for use on the project in [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]]. It was the command ship of the ''Outbound Flight'' and [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Pakmillu]]'s [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]].<ref name="Outbound Flight" />

The [[Combined Operations Center|ComOps Center]] or Combined Operations Center for Outbound Flight could be found aboard Dreadnaught-One. From this area, [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Pakmillu]] had control over all six [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|Dreadnaughts]]. Located just behind the bridge/monitor room complex, the ComOps Center stretched for thirty meters between the two main bow corridors.<ref name="Outbound Flight" />

[[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Jorus C'baoth]]'s quarters were on Deck Three, Suite A-Four, with his former [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Lorana Jinzler]]'s quarters nearby. [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker's]] quarters were on Deck Five, Suite A-Eight.<ref name="Outbound Flight" />

While ''Outbound Flight'' crashed in [[The Redoubt/Legends|the Redoubt]], this Dreadnaught was the one that took the brunt of the impact during the ship's crash landing, [[Death/Legends|killing]] Jinzler and the [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] [[Syndic/Legends|Syndic]] [[Mitth'ras'safis/Legends|Thrass]] in the process.<ref name="Outbound Flight" /> The Dreadnaught remained untouched for fifty years until [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Mara Jade Skywalker]] went into it and discovered the corpses of Lorana Jinzler, Thrass, as well as [[Lorana Jinzler's lightsaber|Lorana's lightsaber]].<ref name="SQ">''[[Survivor's Quest]]''</ref>
